add-multi-line-text-watermark.title: Add Multi‑Line Text Watermark to PDF
add-multi-line-text-watermark.description: Demonstrates adding a multi‑line text watermark to a PDF using FormattedText.AddNewLineText and PdfFileStamp.

rotate-text-stamp.title: Rotate Text Stamp 45 Degrees in PDF
rotate-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates adding a text stamp to a PDF and rotating it 45 degrees around its center.

apply-page-stamp-background.title: Apply PDF Page Stamp as Background to All Pages
apply-page-stamp-background.description: Demonstrates how to add a PDF page stamp as a background to every page of a document using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-file-stamp-template-page.title: Stamp PDF with External Template Using PdfFileStamp
pdf-file-stamp-template-page.description: Demonstrates creating a PdfFileStamp from an external PDF template and applying it to a PDF document.

add-image-text-stamp.title: Add Image and Text to a PDF Stamp
add-image-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to combine a logo image and custom text into a single stamp and apply it to a PDF page.

add-company-header.title: Add Company Header to Every PDF Page
add-company-header.description: Demonstrates adding a header stamp with the company name to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-stamps-per-page.title: Apply Rotating Stamps to PDF Pages Based on Page Index
rotate-stamps-per-page.description: Adds a text stamp to each page of a PDF, rotating the stamp by an angle derived from the page number.

add-background-watermark.title: Add Background Watermark to Selected PDF Pages
add-background-watermark.description: Demonstrates adding a text watermark as a background on pages 2 through 5 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-watermark.title: Batch Add Multi-line Watermark to PDFs
batch-add-watermark.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder and adds the same multi-line watermark stamp to each document.

apply-image-stamp.title: Apply Image Stamp to PDFs and Save to New Directory
apply-image-stamp.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp to each PDF in a source folder and saving the modified files to a target folder while keeping the original file names.

overlay-disclaimer-pdf.title: Overlay Disclaimer PDF using PdfFileStamp
overlay-disclaimer-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a legal disclaimer PDF onto another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp.

add-translucent-watermark.title: Add Translucent Watermark to PDF Using Stamp Opacity
add-translucent-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to apply a 50% opaque stamp as a translucent watermark on all pages of a PDF.

rotated-image-stamp-bottom-right.title: Apply Rotated Image Stamp to Bottom Right of Each PDF Page
rotated-image-stamp-bottom-right.description: Demonstrates adding a 30-degree rotated image stamp to the bottom-right corner of every page in a PDF document.

add-page-number-stamp.title: Add Dynamic Page Number Stamp to PDF
add-page-number-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a text stamp that shows the current page number using a placeholder.

add-multi-line-watermark.title: Add Multi-line Text Watermark to PDF from Memory Stream
add-multi-line-watermark.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a memory stream and adding a multi‑line text watermark with custom font size and color to each page.

add-footer-stamp-10pt-margin.title: Add Footer Stamp with 10-Point Bottom Margin
add-footer-stamp-10pt-margin.description: Demonstrates how to add a footer stamp positioned exactly 10 points above the bottom edge of each page using PdfFileStamp.

apply-stamp-even-pages.title: Apply Stamp to Even Pages of PDF
apply-stamp-even-pages.description: Demonstrates adding a text stamp only to even-numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

qr-code-text-stamp.title: Add QR Code and Text Stamp to PDF
qr-code-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates adding a QR code image stamp and a descriptive text stamp to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-stamp-specific-pages.title: Apply Stamp to Specific PDF Pages
apply-stamp-specific-pages.description: Demonstrates adding a stamp only to pages 1, 5, and 10 of a PDF by accessing those pages directly.

apply-overlay-text-stamp.title: Apply Overlay Text Stamp to PDF
apply-overlay-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to set a stamp's IsBackground property to false so it overlays existing PDF content.

add-dynamic-barcode-header.title: Add Dynamic Barcode Header to Each PDF Page
add-dynamic-barcode-header.description: Demonstrates adding a header stamp with a barcode image generated per page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-transparent-text-stamp.title: Add Transparent Text Stamp with Opacity to PDF
add-transparent-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates adding a semi‑transparent text stamp to selected pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

custom-font-text-stamp.title: Create Text Stamp with Custom TrueType Font
custom-font-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates adding a text stamp using a custom TrueType font to a PDF for branding.

add-page-number-leading-zeros.title: Add Page Numbers with Leading Zeros to PDF
add-page-number-leading-zeros.description: Demonstrates adding a page‑number stamp formatted with leading zeros to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

align-logo-stamp-right.title: Align Logo Stamp to Right Margin
align-logo-stamp-right.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp (logo) to a PDF and align it to the right margin using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

full-page-background-stamp.title: Add Full-Page Background PNG Stamp to PDF
full-page-background-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi-transparent PNG image as a background stamp that covers the entire page area of a PDF.

apply-multiline-text-stamp.title: Apply Multi-line Text Stamp with Custom Line Spacing
apply-multiline-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates adding a multi‑line text stamp to each page of a PDF with a line spacing of 1.5 for improved readability.

add-creation-date-stamp.title: Add Creation Date Stamp to PDF
add-creation-date-stamp.description: Demonstrates adding a text stamp with the document's creation date (yyyy‑MM‑dd) to the top‑left corner of each page.

merge-cover-background.title: Merge Cover Page as Background Using PdfFileStamp
merge-cover-background.description: Demonstrates how to merge a cover PDF with a main document, placing the cover page as a background using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp.

add-image-text-stamp__v2.title: Add Image and Text Stamp to PDF
add-image-text-stamp__v2.description: Demonstrates how to add a combined stamp containing a company logo image and a bold "Confidential" text to each page of a PDF.

apply-multi-line-text-stamp.title: Apply Multi-line Text Stamp with Custom Line Spacing
apply-multi-line-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates adding a text stamp with multiple lines and equal custom spacing between them to each page of a PDF.

add-rotated-text-stamp.title: Add Rotated Text Stamp to PDF
add-rotated-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates adding a text stamp rotated 90 degrees to a PDF page and verifies the rotation setting.

add-footer-page-count.title: Add Footer with Page Count to PDF
add-footer-page-count.description: Demonstrates adding a footer stamp that automatically displays the total page count on each page using a placeholder.

multi-page-pdf-stamp.title: Create Multi‑Page PDF Stamp from Multiple PDFs
multi-page-pdf-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to combine several PDF files as stamps and apply them to a target PDF using PdfFileStamp.

apply-rubber-stamp.title: Apply Rubber Stamp with Custom Border Thickness and Color
apply-rubber-stamp.description: Demonstrates adding a rubber stamp annotation with a custom color and then setting its border thickness on a PDF page.

batch-add-rotated-image-stamp.title: Batch Add Rotated Image Stamp to First Page of PDFs
batch-add-rotated-image-stamp.description: Iterates over PDF files in a directory and adds a rotated image stamp to the first page of each document using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-text-stamp-all-pages.title: Apply a Text Stamp to All Pages Using Page.AddStamp
apply-text-stamp-all-pages.description: Demonstrates how to create a text stamp and efficiently apply it to every page of a PDF using the Page.AddStamp method.

add-file-name-header-stamp.title: Add File Name Header Stamp to PDF
add-file-name-header-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a header stamp that displays the PDF file name using the {file_name} placeholder.

apply-background-stamp.title: Apply Background Stamp with 30% Opacity to PDF
apply-background-stamp.description: Demonstrates adding a semi‑transparent background stamp to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-multi-line-watermark__v2.title: Add Multi‑Line Watermark with Varying Font Sizes
add-multi-line-watermark__v2.description: Demonstrates adding a multi‑line watermark to each page of a PDF, using different font sizes for visual hierarchy.

rotated-text-stamp-odd-pages.title: Apply Rotated Text Stamp to Odd Pages
rotated-text-stamp-odd-pages.description: Adds a 30-degree rotated text stamp to the left margin of every odd-numbered page in a PDF.

add-dynamic-text-stamp.title: Add Dynamic Text Stamp to PDF Pages
add-dynamic-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates creating a TextStamp with interpolated date and author, and applying it to all pages of a PDF.

add-background-watermark__v2.title: Add Repeating Background Watermark Image to PDF
add-background-watermark__v2.description: Demonstrates how to add a background image watermark to every page of a PDF using a single Stamp instance.

add-multi-line-colored-header.title: Add Multi-Line Colored Header to PDF
add-multi-line-colored-header.description: Demonstrates adding multiple header lines with different font colors to each page of a PDF using PdfFileStamp.

add-date-footer-last-page.title: Add Date Footer to Last Page of PDF
add-date-footer-last-page.description: Demonstrates adding a footer containing the current date (MM-dd-yyyy) to only the last page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-apply-rotated-pdf-stamp.title: Batch Apply Rotated PDF Page Stamp to PDFs on Network Share
batch-apply-rotated-pdf-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to iterate PDFs in a network share, apply a rotated page stamp using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and save each stamped document.
